text: The atmosphere evokes a sense of curiosity and anticipation. Behind glass walls, people gather, heads bowed to discussion or learning—there’s energy and intention in that meeting. Here in the corridor, I hover on the periphery, drawn to the juxtaposition of isolation and collective purpose. The exhibit nearby is bold and colorful—declaring innovation, research, and progress. I feel inspired, a little humbled, quietly contemplative about the pursuit of knowledge and the subtle choreography of minds coming together.
